subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and He Who hath appeared in truth and speaketh amidst creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و الذی ظهر بالحق و ینطق بین الخلق
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
